_about: Remote cursor appearance entries keyed by name. Reference one via themes.json 'cursorKey'.
_note: Keys starting with '_' are documentation and safely ignored by Gson.

example._comment_cursorSize: Render size of the cursor image overlay (px) [double]
example._comment_dotRadius: Radius of the player indicator dot (px) [double]
example._comment_dotStrokeWidth: Width of the dot's outline stroke (px) [double]
example._comment_labelFontSize: Font size of the player name label (pt) [int]
example._comment_labelColor: Color of the player name label (hex/rgba/named) [String]
example._comment_cursorImagePath: Optional path to a custom cursor overlay image. Empty = default dot only [String]
